name: CRUD Satuan Barang - Tambah, Edit, Hapus
description: Test CRUD satuan barang: tambah satuan baru dengan nama dan simbol, edit, hapus. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, then click the login button
User is redirected to the dashboard
Satuan Barang page is visible with a data table
Click Tambah Satuan button to open create modal
Fill the nama field with 'Kodi Test' and simbol field with 'kd', then click Simpan
Click the Ubah/edit button on the 'Kodi Test' row
Edit modal opens with current data
Change the name to 'Kodi Test Updated' and click Simpan
The satuan name is updated to 'Kodi Test Updated'
Click the Hapus button on the 'Kodi Test Updated' row
Click confirm Hapus in the modal
'Kodi Test Updated' is removed from the table
